messages.author: swarm
messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Stryker kills zero mutants repo-wide - restore the kill mechanism and ratchet against a silent zero-kill pass
What it solves: CRITICAL - the mutation quality floor is compromised. Stryker reports ZERO mutants killed across
a run (cleaner saw 94 mutants / 2 files / 0 killed) even with coverageAnalysis off and
full-suite-per-mutant runs, while the same mutations ARE caught by a plain `vitest run`. So the
tests work; only St…
How it works: A mutation run's killed/survived counts are classified as healthy, zero-kill-suspect, or no-mutants

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-446 - Stryker kills zero mutants repo-wide - restore the kill mechanism and ratchet against a silent zero-kill pass is complete.
